SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.synthesis

Class SeparationDuty

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.synthesis.SeparationDuty
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public final class SeparationDuty extends Object implements Serializable
Declarative description of a separation problem handed to FlowsheetSynthesisEngine.proposeAndBuild(SeparationDuty).

A duty consists of:

  • a fully-specified feed StreamInterface (composition, flow, T, P),
  • a set of top-product purity requirements (component name → minimum mole fraction required in the lightest product stream), and
  • a set of bottom-product purity requirements (component name → minimum mole fraction required in the heaviest product stream).

Either map may be empty. When both are empty the synthesis engine returns the trivial single-stage flash as a sanity check.

Version:
1.0
Author:
Even Solbraa

  • Constructor Details

    • SeparationDuty

      public SeparationDuty(String name, StreamInterface feed, Map<String,Double> topProductSpecs, Map<String,Double> bottomProductSpecs, double operatingPressureBara)
      Creates a separation duty.
      Parameters:
      name - short identifier used in the generated flowsheet
      feed - the feed stream; must have been run() so that flow and composition are valid
      topProductSpecs - map from component name to required mole fraction in the top product (gas/overhead); may be null or empty
      bottomProductSpecs - map from component name to required mole fraction in the bottom product (liquid/bottoms); may be null or empty
      operatingPressureBara - operating pressure for the separation stage in bara; pass Double.NaN to use the feed pressure

  • Method Details

    • getName

      public String getName()
      Returns the duty identifier.
      Returns:
      non-null name

    • getFeed

      public StreamInterface getFeed()
      Returns the feed stream.
      Returns:
      the feed

    • getTopProductSpecs

      public Map<String,Double> getTopProductSpecs()
      Returns the top-product purity requirements.
      Returns:
      an unmodifiable map; never null

    • getBottomProductSpecs

      public Map<String,Double> getBottomProductSpecs()
      Returns the bottom-product purity requirements.
      Returns:
      an unmodifiable map; never null

    • getOperatingPressureBara

      public double getOperatingPressureBara()
      Returns the operating pressure (bara), or Double.NaN when the synthesis engine should use the feed pressure.
      Returns:
      pressure in bara or NaN
